mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_subject_warehouse t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.name},'%')
AND t.model_id = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.modelId}
AND t.is_show = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.isShow}
AND t.cover like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.cover},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.status}
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_subject_warehouse t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.name},'%')
AND t.model_id = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.modelId}
AND t.is_show = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.isShow}
AND t.cover like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.cover},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status = #{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.status}
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbSubjectWarehouseEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_subject_warehouse t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
